ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Fen (Ëë£Ëä¨)was born in Hongong. Tried to copy Gan Shi‚Äôs breathing style but failed, almost killing himself in the attempt. Dong Fen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
